title: Osquery

headings.text: Why SOCs & IR teams use osquery

overview: osquery (open-source, originally developed at Facebook, 2014) exposes an endpoint’s runtime state as queryable tables (a relational view of OS artifacts). You use SQL-like SELECT queries to retrieve structured endpoint data — processes, users, network sockets, installed software, registry/startup entries, files and hashes, etc. It runs on Windows, Linux, mac
